AMI is your low-risk partner for high-stakes innovation. Our firmware solutions drive performance, reliability and time to market when it matters most.

When you work with AMI, you get deep expertise, proven stability and hands-on support throughout your development journey. Contact us to learn how AMI firmware solutions can help you reduce risk, simplify complexity and scale with confidence.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_text=”Contact Us” button_alignment=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_button=”on” button_text_size=”15px” button_text_color=”#000000″ button_border_width=”1px” button_border_radius=”50px” button_font=”Aptos|600|||||||” button_use_icon=”off” custom_margin=”20px||0px||false|false” custom_padding=”10px|50px|10px|50px|true|true” global_colors_info=”{}” button_bg_color__hover_enabled=”on|desktop” button_bg_color__hover=”#000000″ button_bg_enable_color__hover=”on” button_text_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_text_color__hover=”#FFFFFF” button_border_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_border_color__hover=”#000000″][/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]

Prem’ Day

May 5–6, 2026

  • News
  • Product Updates

AMI, ADLINK and Linaro to Debut Embedded UEFI / BIOS Firmware Demo Powered by AMI Meridian at Embedded World 2026

AMI, ADLINK, and Linaro showcase AMI Meridian's AI-enhanced UEFI firmware lifecycle management — featuring SBOM, CRA compliance, and ONEBoot — at Embedded World 2026.

  • News
  • About AMI

AMI Welcomes New Chief Commercial Officer Ken Sun, Chief Financial Officer Todd Glickman and Chief Human Resources Officer Saloni Sachdev

Firmware leader AMI expands senior leadership with proven executives Ken Sun (CCO), Todd Glickman (CFO), and Saloni Sachdev (CHRO) to drive innovation and global growth.

  • Blog
  • About AMI

Ken Sun on Why He Joined AMI: A Bet on What Comes Next

AMI's new CCO Ken Sun on why firmware is the missing piece in AI infrastructure, the IT-OT convergence, and why he's betting on what comes next in enterprise technology.

  • Blog
  • About AMI

Ken Sun on Why He Joined AMI: A Bet on What Comes Next

AMI's new CCO Ken Sun on why firmware is the missing piece in AI infrastructure, the IT-OT convergence, and why he's betting on what comes next in enterprise technology.

  • Blog
  • MegaRAC

Announcing MegaRAC OneTree Version 3.0: The Next Evolution of OpenBMC-Based Server Management from AMI

MegaRAC OneTree 3.0 delivers unified firmware management, expanded silicon support and advanced development tools to help data centers achieve greater efficiency and security

  • Blog
  • Open Source

AMI to Showcase Advanced Data Center Technologies at New ScaleUp Technologies OCP Experience Center in Fürth, Germany

ATLANTA, GEORGIA / MUNICH, GERMANY: AMI, the global leader in Dynamic Firmware for modern computing, is proud to announce its participation in the Grand Opening of the ScaleUp Technologies OCP

  • Blog

AMI Expands Support to Open-source Ecosystem and Accelerates OpenBMC Adoption

ATLANTA, GEORGIA: AMI®, a global leader in dynamic firmware, is advancing open firmware innovation by delivering a unified, secure, SLA-backed OpenBMC codebase that streamlines development, reduces duplication, and accelerates platform

  • Data Sheets
  • MegaRAC

MegaRAC AST2600 Development Kit

The MegaRAC Development Kit for the AST2600 BMC featureshardware, tutorials, and access to our MegaRAC CommunityEdition™ BMC Firmware based on The Linux Foundation®OpenBMC™ firmware.
